chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.D-25 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA No.3717 / 2017. 2. For orders on MA No.3718 / 2017. 3. For hearing. 29-01-2018 None present. This criminal miscellaneous application is called for hearing. Neither the applicant nor his counsel is present. No intimation received. It is 11.50 a.m. It appears from the record that this criminal miscellaneous application was filed on 15.05.2017 and since then nobody is perusing this matter diligently, which shows that the applicant has lost interest in the matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Office is directed to immediately send copy of this order to the trial Court for information. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
